fields.name: Security Policy Documentation
fields.description: Develop, document, and maintain comprehensive information security policies covering all aspects of cybersecurity including: access control, data protection, incident response, risk management, and third-party security
fields.implementation_notes: Policy должна включати: мету, область застосування, відповідальні особи, процедури перегляду. Затвердження Правлінням банку обов'язкове.
fields.evidence_notes: Required evidence: Approved policy document, Board minutes, dissemination records, acknowledgment forms from staff

fields.name: Access Control Implementation
fields.description: Implement role-based access control (RBAC) mechanisms for all critical systems and data. Ensure principle of least privilege, separation of duties, and regular access reviews
fields.implementation_notes: Впровадити систему управління доступом з автентифікацією (MFA обов'язково для критичних систем), авторизацією на основі ролей, логуванням всіх доступів
fields.evidence_notes: Required: Access control matrix, role definitions, access logs, quarterly access reviews, MFA implementation proof

fields.name: Security Monitoring and Logging
fields.description: Establish continuous security monitoring with centralized log collection, analysis, and alerting. Implement SIEM system for real-time threat detection
fields.implementation_notes: Впровадити SIEM систему, налаштувати збір логів з усіх критичних систем, створити правила кореляції подій, налаштувати alerting
fields.evidence_notes: Required: SIEM configuration, log retention policy (min 1 year), correlation rules, incident response procedures, monthly security reports

fields.name: Incident Response Procedures
fields.description: Develop and regularly test incident response procedures including detection, containment, eradication, recovery, and lessons learned phases
fields.implementation_notes: Створити Incident Response Team, розробити playbooks для різних типів інцидентів, проводити tabletop exercises щоквартально
fields.evidence_notes: Required: IR plan, team roster, contact lists, test results (min quarterly), incident logs, post-incident reports

fields.name: Vulnerability Management Program
fields.description: Implement vulnerability assessment and patch management program with regular scanning, prioritization, and remediation tracking
fields.implementation_notes: Проводити сканування вразливостей мінімум щомісяця, critical patches встановлювати протягом 48 годин, вести реєстр вразливостей
fields.evidence_notes: Required: Vulnerability scan reports, patch management policy, remediation tracking, exception approvals

fields.name: Business Impact Analysis
fields.description: Conduct comprehensive Business Impact Analysis (BIA) to identify critical business functions, recovery time objectives (RTO), and recovery point objectives (RPO)
fields.implementation_notes: BIA має бути проведений для всіх критичних процесів, оновлюватись щорічно або при значних змінах в бізнес-процесах
fields.evidence_notes: Required: BIA report, critical functions list, RTO/RPO definitions, dependency mapping, annual review records

fields.name: Disaster Recovery Plan
fields.description: Develop and maintain Disaster Recovery Plan with detailed recovery procedures, alternative processing sites, and data backup strategies
fields.implementation_notes: DR план має включати процедури відновлення для всіх критичних систем, контакти, альтернативні майданчики. Тестування мінімум 2 рази на рік
fields.evidence_notes: Required: DR plan document, test results (min bi-annual), backup verification logs, alternative site agreement

fields.name: Data Processing Registry
fields.description: Maintain complete registry of all personal data processing activities including purpose, legal basis, categories of data, retention periods
fields.implementation_notes: Реєстр обробки персональних даних має бути повним, актуальним, доступним для перевірки регулятором
fields.evidence_notes: Required: Processing registry (ROPA), legal basis documentation, privacy notices, data subject rights procedures

fields.name: Data Subject Rights Management
fields.description: Implement procedures for handling data subject rights requests (access, rectification, erasure, data portability, objection)
fields.implementation_notes: Процедури обробки запитів суб'єктів даних мають бути задокументовані, терміни відповіді - не більше 30 днів
fields.evidence_notes: Required: DSR procedures, request log, response templates, staff training records

fields.name: Critical Infrastructure Classification
fields.description: Identify and classify critical information infrastructure objects according to state methodology
fields.implementation_notes: Класифікація об'єктів критичної інфраструктури згідно методології, реєстрація в державному реєстрі
fields.evidence_notes: Required: Classification report, registration certificate, risk assessment, protection measures plan

fields.name: ICT Governance Framework
fields.description: Establish ICT governance framework with clear roles, responsibilities, and decision-making processes for ICT management
fields.implementation_notes: ICT governance framework must include: strategy, policies, organizational structure, reporting lines, KPIs
fields.evidence_notes: Required: Governance framework document, organizational chart, policy documents, meeting minutes, KPI reports

fields.name: Cybersecurity Controls Implementation
fields.description: Implement technical and organizational cybersecurity controls including firewalls, IDS/IPS, encryption, access control, and security awareness
fields.implementation_notes: Controls must be risk-based, regularly tested, and aligned with international standards (ISO 27001, NIST CSF)
fields.evidence_notes: Required: Control catalog, implementation records, test results, configuration baselines, change logs

fields.name: Third-Party Service Provider Management
fields.description: Manage ICT third-party service providers including due diligence, contractual safeguards, and ongoing monitoring
fields.implementation_notes: Due diligence process must include security assessment, right to audit clauses in contracts, regular performance reviews
fields.evidence_notes: Required: Vendor registry, due diligence reports, contracts with security clauses, audit rights, monitoring reports

fields.name: Business Continuity Testing
fields.description: Conduct regular business continuity and disaster recovery tests including failover procedures and alternative processing sites
fields.implementation_notes: BCP tests minimum annually, critical systems - semi-annually. Document results, identify gaps, implement improvements
fields.evidence_notes: Required: Test plans, test results, gap analysis, remediation plans, board reports

fields.name: Information Security Organization
fields.description: Establish information security organizational structure with dedicated CISO, security team, and clear reporting lines to management
fields.implementation_notes: CISO должен иметь прямую линию отчетности к высшему руководству, независимость от IT подразделения
fields.evidence_notes: Required: Organizational chart, CISO appointment order, job descriptions, reporting structure, budget allocation

fields.name: Access Control and Authentication
fields.description: Implement strong authentication mechanisms including multi-factor authentication for remote access and privileged accounts
fields.implementation_notes: MFA обязательна для всех удаленных подключений и привилегированных учетных записей. Централизованное управление доступом
fields.evidence_notes: Required: Authentication policy, MFA implementation proof, access control lists, privilege management procedures

fields.name: Cryptographic Protection
fields.description: Implement cryptographic controls for data protection in transit and at rest, key management procedures
fields.implementation_notes: Использовать утвержденные криптографические алгоритмы (минимум AES-256, RSA-2048), безопасное управление ключами
fields.evidence_notes: Required: Crypto policy, algorithm list, key management procedures, encryption implementation proof, HSM usage

fields.name: Security Audit and Monitoring
fields.description: Conduct regular information security audits, maintain comprehensive audit logs, implement continuous monitoring
fields.implementation_notes: Внутренний аудит ИБ - минимум ежегодно, внешний - раз в 2 года. Логи хранить минимум 1 год
fields.evidence_notes: Required: Audit schedule, internal audit reports, external audit reports, log retention policy, monitoring dashboards
